info.name: GraphQL – Sales Navigator Module
info.description: Sales Navigator: salesNavigatorRecords (query); saveSalesNavigatorProfiles (mutation). Variables: use camelCase. See sql/apis/23_SALES_NAVIGATOR_MODULE.md (Queries and mutations – parameters and variable types).

body.raw: {"query":"mutation SaveSalesNavigatorProfiles($input: SaveProfilesInput!) { salesNavigator { saveSalesNavigatorProfiles(input: $input) { success savedCount failedCount } } }","variables":{"input":{"profiles":[{}]}}
